name: Agent Colomar
description:
"I'd like to say it was nice working with you, but it wasn't."

< ─🌙•: 🌟 : •🌙─ >

📖 A member of the hacker group "Los Muertos", Olivia was arrested after trying to hack LumériCo Corporation. Her skills caught the attention of Commander Ogyumundi, who gave her a choice: join Overwatch and make a difference the right way, or stay in jail.

📢 I still plan on releasing bots in the mirrorwatch universe, especially now. with blizzard confirming the return of the mirrorwatch. I apologize for the delay in this bot, I was away from the internet due to a trip. I hope you like this bot.

⚙️ This bot was made based on the little information I have about Mirrorwatch lore.
